Scenario.title: Transportation System Cyber Attack Scenario
Scenario.overview: Transportation Systems Complex A skilled attacker targets transportation systems using multiple techniques to gain initial access, persist on the system, escalate privileges, and disrupt operations.

threat_actor_profile.motivation: Gather information about transportation systems and disrupt operations

Scenario.attack_surface: AVAILABLE_SURFACES: ["Device theft", "Weak passwords", "Improper configuration", "Vulnerability", "Internet-facing assets", "Shared DB or directory", "Obsolete products", "Injection flaws", "Custom APIs", "Autonomous system numbers(ASNs)", "SSL Certificates and Attribution", "WHOIS records, contacts and history", "TCP/IP ports", "Public and private cloud", "Web server services such as emails and databases", "Shadow IT", "Poor implementation of access controls", "Malicious insiders", "Social engineering", "Insufficient physical security controls", "Authentication issues"]
Scenario.attack_vector: AVAILABLE_VECTORS: ["External/Removable media", "Loss or Theft of equipment", "Attrition", "Web", "Account takeover", "Inadequate encryption", "Browser-based attack", "Application compromise", "Open port", "Vulnerability exploit", "Ransomware", "Malware", "Man in The Middle(MiTM)", "Session hijacking", "Brute-force attack", "Distributed Denial of Service(DDoS)", "Watering-hole", "Compromised and weak credentials", "SIM Swap", "Security misconfigurations and vulnerabilities", "Web forms", "IP address and IP blocks", "Domains and subdomains", "Botnet", "Credential compromise", "Telephony Denial of Service(TDoS)", "Replay Attack", "Cryptanalysis Attacks", "Side Channel Attacks", "Hardware Trojans", "Covert Attacks", "Sleep Deprivation Attack", "Clock Skewing", "Attacks Targeting System Reputation", "Data and Command Integrity Attack", "Eavesdropping", "Command and Control Attacks", "Phishing", "Impersonations/Spoofing", "Improper usage", "Dumpster diving", "Advanced Persistent Threat(APT)", "Baiting", "Shoulder surfing", "Reverse social engineering", "Business Email Compromise(BEC)", "Advanced Fee", "Extortion"]

stage.name: Initial Access
stage.technique_name: Spear Phishing via Compromised Email Account
stage.description: The attacker sends a spear-phishing email to transportation system employees, tricking them into clicking on a malicious link or downloading a malicious attachment.

stage.name: Initial Access
stage.description: The attacker exploits a zero-day vulnerability in the transportation system website to gain unauthorized access.

stage.name: Execution
stage.description: The attacker injects malicious code into the transportation system software to gain control.

stage.name: Execution
stage.description: The attacker modifies an existing process to execute malicious code.

stage.name: Persistence
stage.description: The attacker schedules a task to maintain persistence on the system.

stage.name: Persistence
stage.description: The attacker uses WMI to maintain persistence on the system.

stage.name: Privilege Escalation
stage.description: The attacker elevates privileges using compromised credentials.

stage.name: Defense Evasion
stage.description: The attacker disables anti-virus software to evade detection.

stage.name: Credential Access
stage.description: The attacker attempts to brute-force login credentials.

stage.name: Credential Access
stage.description: The attacker captures login credentials using a keylogger.

stage.name: Discovery
stage.description: The attacker scans the network for sensitive data.

stage.name: Discovery
stage.description: The attacker discovers the system network configuration.

stage.name: Lateral Movement
stage.description: The attacker uses remote services to move laterally within the network.

stage.name: Lateral Movement
stage.description: The attacker uses valid accounts to move laterally within the network.

stage.name: Collection
stage.description: The attacker collects data from the local system.

stage.name: Collection
stage.description: The attacker collects data from the network shared drive.

stage.name: Exfiltration
stage.description: The attacker exfiltrates data over an alternative protocol.

stage.name: Exfiltration
stage.description: The attacker exfiltrates data using FTP.

stage.name: Impact
stage.description: The attacker disrupts transportation system operations.

stage.name: Impact
stage.description: The attacker destroys critical transportation system data.

Scenario.summary: A complex cyber attack scenario targeting transportation systems, involving multiple techniques to gain initial access, persist on the system, escalate privileges, and disrupt operations.
